raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a monitor and XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, initially they both said they would arrive Friday. After work Friday I come home and wait for my packages and don't see any. I contact them and they said both have delivered. The XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX said that it was in transit on the bestbuy app. Regardless I never got them and contacted bestbuy, their representative XXXX said I would be refunded this was on XX/XX/XXXX. I never got the refund and contacted bestbuy again but this time they said according to the shipper it was delivered and that they would not be refunding me.
